name: ai-inner-os
description: Framework for a Claude Code plugin that surfaces visible Inner OS monologue.

scripts.check: node --check hooks/session-start.js && node --check hooks/pre-tool-use.js && node --check hooks/post-tool-use.js && node --check hooks/post-tool-use-failure.js && node --check hooks/pre-compact.js && node --check hooks/post-compact.js && node --check hooks/subagent-start.js && node --check hooks/subagent-stop.js && node --check hooks/stop.js && node --check hooks/lib/session.js && node --check hooks/lib/persona.js && node --check hooks/lib/config.js && node --check hooks/lib/state.js && node --check hooks/lib/prompt.js && node --check scripts/switch-persona.js && node --check scripts/install.js && node --check codex/hooks/session-start.js && node --check codex/hooks/post-tool-use.js && node --check codex/hooks/session-stop.js && node --check cursor/hooks/session-start.js && node --check cursor/hooks/post-tool-use.js && node --check cursor/hooks/stop.js && node --check opencode/plugins/inner-os.js && node --check openclaw/index.js
scripts.test: node --test tests/events.test.js && node --test tests/persona.test.js && node --test tests/prompt.test.js && node --test tests/state.test.js && node --test tests/switch-persona.test.js
